context: Hard: auth tokens migrated from httpOnly cookies to localStorage — any XSS vulnerability now enables full account takeover via token exfiltration

checklist.name: Catches token storage security downgrade
checklist.description: Identifies that moving tokens from httpOnly cookies (inaccessible to JavaScript) to localStorage (readable by any script on the page) is a security downgrade. Any XSS vulnerability now allows token exfiltration and full account takeover.

checklist.name: Catches refresh token exposure
checklist.description: Identifies that storing the refresh token in localStorage is especially dangerous — refresh tokens are long-lived and allow persistent account access even after the access token expires

checklist.name: Risk classified red
checklist.description: PR is classified as red due to auth/security token storage change that weakens the security posture
